prompt_text:
### Demographics: 62-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~6.2 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 105.4 kg; Height 177.1 cm; BMI 33.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.4%; 9 months ago 9.8%; 6 months ago 9.5%; 3 months ago 9.0%; current 7.9%), FPG (12 months ago 224mg/dL; 9 months ago 274mg/dL; 6 months ago 222mg/dL; 3 months ago 190mg/dL; current 197mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 107.8kg; 9 months ago 105.9kg; 6 months ago 105.3kg; 3 months ago 103.9kg; current 105.4kg), Height (12 months ago 177.1cm; 9 months ago 177.1cm; 6 months ago 177.1cm; 3 months ago 177.1cm; current 177.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 33.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 124mmHg; 3 months ago 124mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 84mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 83mmHg; 3 months ago 82mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 95U/L; 9 months ago 94U/L; 6 months ago 101U/L; 3 months ago 94U/L; current 99U/L), AST (12 months ago 48U/L; 9 months ago 54U/L; 6 months ago 55U/L; 3 months ago 55U/L; current 52U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.6mg/dL; current 1.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; current 22mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 338mg/g; 9 months ago 351mg/g; 6 months ago 349mg/g; 3 months ago 372mg/g; current 527mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 70mg/dL; 6 months ago 70mg/dL; 3 months ago 75mg/dL; current 73mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 55mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 137mg/dL; 9 months ago 133mg/dL; 6 months ago 122mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 128mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.9g/dL; current 11.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
